vibe: Enterprise-grade (Jira/ClickUp/Linear level), gamified contribution economy, high authority, clean and functional. Avoid generic SaaS purple-gradient AI-slop.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold leading-none tracking-tighter
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold leading-tight tracking-tight

spacing_and_layout.kanban_board: flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory gap-6 pb-8
spacing_and_layout.kanban_column: min-w-[320px] max-w-[350px] snap-center flex flex-col gap-4 bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 h-full

surface_styles.cards: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

components.buttons: rounded-lg font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-all duration-200 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.inputs: bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary w-full text-gray-900
components.badges: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 border border-gray-200
components.avatar: h-10 w-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white shadow-sm object-cover

pages.landing_auth: Clean split-screen layout. Left side: Login form, centered, minimal. Right side: Abstract architectural image (representing structure/hive).
pages.dashboard: Bento grid layout for key metrics (Credits, Rep, Open Requests). Recent activity feed. Quick actions.
pages.request_board: Kanban-style horizontal scrolling columns. Dense information architecture, easy drag/drop or status update.
pages.request_detail: Two-column layout (Main content + Sidebar). Main: Title, desc, discussion, file uploads. Sidebar: Status, Assignees, Bounty, Tags.
pages.leaderboard: List layout with rank highlighting. Top 3 get special visual treatment (Gold, Silver, Bronze accents).
pages.rewards: Grid of cards for items. Prominent 'Current Balance' sticky header. High-quality imagery for physical items.
pages.profile: Header section with Avatar, Name, Reputation Score, Badge display. Tabs for 'Completed Requests', 'Skills', 'Activity'.
pages.admin: Data-heavy tables for user management and org settings. Clear toggle switches, minimal aesthetic.

testing_requirements: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='submit-request-button').

login_background.description: Black and white abstract geometric architecture

instructions_to_main_agent.testing: CRITICAL: You must add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent.navigation: Sticky crystal glass header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-gray-200).
instructions_to_main_agent.kanban_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, hover: shadow-md, translateY(-2px). Show avatar stack for assignees.
instructions_to_main_agent.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog, backdrop blur on overlay, centered layout.
instructions_to_main_agent.images: Use the exact image URLs provided in this JSON. DO NOT use placeholder services.
